Media.Title: Game Of Thrones
Media.Description: Game of Thrones is a sprawling fantasy epic set in the fictional continents of Westeros and Essos, where noble families vie for power, honor, and survival. As political intrigue, betrayal, and war unfold, legendary heroes and villains alike navigate a world filled with dragons, dark magic, and the ever-present threat of supernatural forces beyond the Wall. Renowned for its complex characters, intricate storytelling, and cinematic scale, the series explores the human struggle for power in a morally ambiguous world.

Media.Title: Breaking Bad
Media.Description: A Breaking Bad movie about Jesse Pinkman.

Media.Title: Friends
Media.Description: A sitcom about six friends in New York.
